5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

5606.issue: [W5606] i18n "admin/i18n" seems to contain untranslated entries identical to English (>=3 words). Affected languages: de (2 keys, examples: LBL_TibberClientId, LBL_TibberClientSecret); nl (2 keys, examples: LBL_TibberClientId, LBL_TibberClientSecret); pl (2 keys, examples: LBL_TibberClientId, LBL_TibberClientSecret); pt (1 key, example: LBL_item_feedActive); ru (2 keys, examples: LBL_TibberClientId, LBL_TibberClientSecret); uk (2 keys, examples: LBL_TibberClientId, LBL_TibberClientSecret).
